a_image.alt: Darkcore style mood board — Aesthetic · Deep & Brooding

sections.a_eyebrow: Dark · Moody · Dark Mode · Bold · Gritty
sections.a_description: Pitch-black depths, blood-red warnings, and the oppressive weight of interfaces designed to feel like industrial machinery — Darkcore pushes dark mode past aesthetics into atmosphere. The relentless darkness, harsh red accents, and angular condensed typography create spaces that feel heavy, industrial, and deliberately inhospitable — beauty through intimidation.

This aggressively dark style powers industrial music platforms, horror game interfaces, dark electronic music labels, and underground art communities. You'll see it on noise music project pages, industrial design portfolios, dark ambient streaming platforms, and cybersecurity-themed sites — anywhere that the interface needs to feel like a warning label in a condemned factory.

The relentlessly dark, industrial aesthetic of darkcore — pitch black backgrounds, harsh red accents, and the oppressive weight of interfaces designed to feel heavy and foreboding. Background: pure black (#000000). The .inner panel has an almost-black background (#0a0a0a) with a 1px border (#1a1a1a) — surface distinction through the subtlest shade difference. Colors: blood red (#cc0000) as the sole accent — aggressive, warning-like, and deliberately uncomfortable. Off-white (#d0d0d0) for headings, dark gray (#666666) for body text. The aesthetic is oppressive by design — heavy, industrial, and uncompromising in its darkness. Set in Rajdhani — a condensed, angular sans-serif with industrial weight and sharp edges. Heading at weight 600, 26px, line-height 1.2, text-transform uppercase, letter-spacing 1px, color #d0d0d0. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 3px letter-spacing, color #cc0000. Body at weight 400, 14px, line-height 1.6, color #666666. Buttons: primary — red (#cc0000), white text, 2px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, red border. Alternatives: Chakra Petch (angular technical), Saira (condensed industrial).
{What this palette represents — the core identity}
